allow: PowerShell($bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(128, 128\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.Clear\([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(79, 70, 229\)\); $font = New-Object System.Drawing.Font\('Arial', 48, [System.Drawing.FontStyle]::Bold\); $brush = [System.Drawing.Brushes]::White; $g.DrawString\('T', $font, $brush, 30, 32\); $font.Dispose\(\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Save\('e:\\resource\\wx-proj\\compress\\Z\\native-bridge\\icons\\icon-128.png', [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output 'Icon created')

PowerShell($bin = "e:\\resource\\wx-proj\\compress\\Z\\native-host\\target\\release\\titan-host.exe"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath $bin -NoNewWindow -RedirectStandardError "t:\\temp\\native-test-stderr.txt" -PassThru; Write-Host "Process started, PID: $\($proc.Id\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force; Get-Content "t:\\temp\\native-test-stderr.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

Bash(pwsh -Command '$proc = Start-Process -FilePath "./target/release/titan-host.exe" -NoNewWindow -PassThru; Write-Host "PID: $\($proc.Id\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force; Write-Host "Process ended"')
